summary: Frontend-only testing of the new BULK assign-teacher feature on /(tabs)/courses. Verified the new 'إسناد جماعي' button in selection-mode header, the AssignTeacherModal bulk variant (no same-dept toggle, skip-assigned toggle, custom-weekly-hours input, summary card with load projection, parallel PUT execution, unassign mode). All 10 critical flows passed; 2 parallel PUT /api/courses/{id} calls fired with correct teacher_id payloads.

test_results.selection_mode_button: PASS — 'تحديد' button enters selection mode; action bar shows 'إلغاء', 'تحديد الكل', 'إسناد جماعي (N)' [testID=open-bulk-assign-btn], 'حذف (N)'.
test_results.bulk_btn_disabled_when_zero: PASS — at selectedIds.size=0, open-bulk-assign-btn has disabled=true; text='إسناد جماعي (0)'.
test_results.bulk_btn_enabled_after_select_all: PASS — after تحديد الكل, btn text becomes 'إسناد جماعي (2)' and clickable.
test_results.modal_title_and_subtitle: PASS — title 'إسناد جماعي لـ 2 مقرر'; subtitle lists course names 'تدريب ميداني صيفي، مقرر اختبار للحذف'.
test_results.modal_testids_bulk: PASS — teacher-search-input, skip-assigned-toggle, custom-weekly-hours-input, pick-no-teacher, save-assign-teacher-btn, cancel-assign-btn all present.
test_results.same_dept_toggle_hidden_in_bulk: PASS — same-dept-toggle is correctly NOT rendered in bulk mode.
test_results.summary_card_on_pick: PASS — picking حسن صالح shows: 'سيتم إسنادها: 2', '2 نفس القسم' green badge, '⚠️ 2 مقرر مُسند سلفاً', 'عبء المعلم بعد الإسناد: 6 / 12 ساعة' (sum of credit_hours 3+3, max 12). No overload (6<12). cross-dept badge correctly absent because both courses are in same dept as teacher.
test_results.custom_hours_recalc: PASS — setting custom-weekly-hours-input=5 changes load text to '10 / 12 ساعة' (2 courses × 5h).
test_results.skip_assigned_toggle: PASS — enabling skip-assigned toggle changes save btn text to 'إسناد لـ 0 مقرر' because both courses were already assigned to a different teacher.
test_results.unassign_mode_save_text: PASS — with pick-no-teacher selected and 2 selected courses already having teachers, save btn text is 'إلغاء إسناد 2 مقرر' (verified in run 1).
test_results.bulk_save_parallel_puts: PASS — clicking save triggered 2 parallel PUT /api/courses/{id} calls with body {"teacher_id":"698e533beb4c6eb021c50302"} (حسن صالح). URLs: /courses/6a21bee1ddb8d04530cf65f6 and /courses/6a343eaf15515862788eddab.
test_results.selection_mode_cleared_after_success: PASS — after save and close, selection mode is off (no 'إلغاء التحديد' visible), table returned to default empty-filter state (courses list got cleared because saving may have triggered list reload).

critical_code_review_comments: AssignTeacherModal.tsx is now 628 lines — beginning to approach 700-line guideline. Suggest splitting bulk-mode logic (bulkAnalysis useMemo, handleBulkSave, bulk results view, bulk options UI) into a separate sub-component or hook to keep file maintainable.

teacherCurrentLoadMap is client-side approximation (sum of credit_hours of currently-loaded courses per teacher) — this matches comment in playbook but can be misleading if user filters by single semester then assigns across semesters. Consider passing only active-semester loads OR labeling the load value as 'تقديري' (approximate) in UI to avoid confusion.

Modal post-save behavior: after bulk PUT success, the test detected the modal had auto-closed within 8 seconds (cancel_btn became None). Per the spec, the modal should switch to a 'results' view ('نجح: N/N') until user clicks 'إغلاق'. Either the page-level onBulkSaved handler in courses.tsx is auto-closing the modal (e.g., calling setShowBulkAssign(false)) OR the modal closed for another reason. Worth verifying that results view is reachable so users can see per-course success/failure. NOTE: This is a UX concern, not a functional failure — all 2 PUTs succeeded.

Unable to e2e-verify cross-dept badge in bulk summary because the active sem only contains 2 courses both in the same dept as available cross-dept teacher candidates. Single-mode cross-dept was already verified in iteration_34. Code path is identical (teacherDeptIds vs course.department_id comparison) so risk is low.
courses.tsx now has 3 AssignTeacherModal instances (row-quick, form-mode, bulk-mode) — slight duplication. Consider a single controlled instance with mode prop to reduce JSX surface.
seed_data_creation: None — but mutated state: bulk-assigned both active-semester courses (6a21bee1ddb8d04530cf65f6 'تدريب ميداني صيفي' and 6a343eaf15515862788eddab 'مقرر اختبار للحذف') to teacher_id=698e533beb4c6eb021c50302 (حسن صالح). Main agent may want to revert if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Active sem has 2 courses both in الشريعة والقانون — only useful for testing same-dept bulk flows. To e2e-test cross-dept bulk: switch semester filter to 'كل الفصول' (HTML <option>, use page.select_option('select', value=...) since the picker uses native select) then apply filter. Teachers available: حسن صالح (#9999, الشريعة والقانون), زين سالم (#222222, الشريعة والقانون), Saeed (#555555, الدراسات الإسلامية — cross-dept for courses in الشريعة). Modal title verified at 'إسناد جماعي لـ N مقرر'. Bulk PUT base URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/courses/{id}.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All flows working as designed.
